2026-05-26ISEDSocial Sciences and Humanities Research Council ActReappointment of a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research CouncilRe-appointment of Asa Kachan of Halifax, Nova Scotia, as a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.N/A
act: Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council Act
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council
precis: Re-appointment of Asa Kachan of Halifax, Nova Scotia, as a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.
